name: Create social media posts from a published blog using ChatGPT 2/2

expect.name: for_super_followers_only
expect.label: Allow to Tweet Exclusively for Super Followers Only

parameters.name: handleErrors
parameters.label: Evaluate all states as errors (except for 2xx and 3xx )

expect.name: shareCookies
expect.label: Share cookies with other HTTP modules

notes.content:
Replace the {your_webhook_url} in the URL below with your webhook URL.

Copy the URL and go over to the Airtable base we provided and edit the 'Publish' field. Paste the URL in the URL formula field.

"{your_webhook_url}" & ENCODE_URL_COMPONENT({Post}) & "&Article%20URL=" & ENCODE_URL_COMPONENT({Article URL}) & "&Excerpt=" & ENCODE_URL_COMPONENT({Excerpt}) & "&Platform=" & ENCODE_URL_COMPONENT({Platform}) & "&Image%20link=" & ENCODE_URL_COMPONENT({Image link}) & "&Record%20ID=" & ENCODE_URL_COMPONENT(RECORD_ID())

Once done, hit the Run once button in the scenario builder, then go back to Airtable and click the Make button in the 'Publish' field in test example record so that the webhook learns the data structure.
